firmware.title: Android 14
firmware.description:
Your Pixel is getting even better…

It's receiving this software update as part of the latest Feature Drop, which brings new and upgraded features to your device to make it even more helpful. Learn more at g.co/pixel/community.

Downloading updates over a mobile network or while roaming may cause additional charges.
